name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-12
title: Remove chained-workspace cruft from rabbit-file (post BUG-33 won't-fix)
description:
Follow-up to RABBIT-FILE-BUG-33 closed as won't-fix. Project owner directive: each workspace MUST be standalone and self-contained; chained-workspace topologies (wsN->wsN-1->...->GitHub) are no longer supported. Remove all chained-workspace code paths, spec/contract prose, and tests that exist solely to support that topology.

Decision: remove outright (do NOT keep as defensive safety net per Designed Deprecation principle — borrowed time, and a misconfigured origin will surface loud on first push anyway).

Scope:
- branch_ops.py: delete _is_local_origin helper (lines ~159-183); delete local-origin RuntimeError branch in _ensure_branch (lines ~199-212)
- docs/spec/spec.md: remove chained-workspace prose (~lines 243-256) and any related invariants
- docs/spec/contract.md: remove line 22 'refuses orphan creation when origin is local' and line 71 'never' clause about local-origin orphans
- test/test-bug-32-chained-workspace-guard.py: delete entire file
- test/conftest.py: remove chained_repos fixture and BUG-32 workaround comments
- test/test-file-item.py, test-list-items.py, test-item-status.py, test-branch-ops.py: remove BUG-32 pre-seed workarounds

Regression test: confirm fresh standalone repo against real (or mocked-as-remote) origin auto-bootstraps the orphan branch on first use.

Lifecycle: closes once code/spec/tests no longer reference chained-workspace topology and standard branch_ops tests still pass.
